backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Product type with categories and CRUD operations (create, getAll, getByCategory, getById) backed by an in-memory Map, with blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Instagram DM button in ProductCard.tsx was updated to use https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-31.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short descriptions, serving as a pre-generated summary reference for all frontend components, pages, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query with a 5-minute stale time and composes the full page layout: Header, HeroBanner, AboutSection, AdminPage, ProductsPage, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static section component displaying three feature cards (Authentic Merch, Nationwide Delivery, Cash on Delivery) with neon blue icons and a headline about COD availability.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Internet Identity login/logout button that shows a shortened principal when authenticated and a loading spinner during the login process.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with Instagram and email contact links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking based on the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header displaying the Anime_Vibe_PK logo and an Instagram link button with neon blue styling.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Hero section with a background image overlay, animated neon blue 'Anime Merch Pakistan' heading, and a pulsing 'Pre-Orders Open' badge.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card displaying image, category badge, name, PKR price, and a pre-order button that links directly to the Instagram DM chat at https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for creating products (mutation) and fetching all products or products by category (queries) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS layers, CSS custom properties for a dark neon-blue theme, and utility classes for neon glow effects and colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page component that provides an authenticated form for creating new products, including image upload with progress tracking and category selection.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Products listing page that displays merchandise with category filter tabs, loading skeletons, and product counts fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with oklch-based CSS variable colors, neon-blue custom colors, custom border radii, Inter font family, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 15) for the Anime_Vibe_PK merchandise store, including architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and contact/social media details for a dark JJK-themed Pakistani anime merch site.
